chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 446, 447, 448 & 449 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.4,8 & 28 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.2152/2024 15.04.2026 Messrs. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Agha Shahid Majeed Khan, Shoaib Mansoor advocate for respondents Rana Sakhawat Ali advocate holds brief for Syed Hassan Zaman Shah, advocate for respondent No.2 in SCRA 448 of 2024 These references are pending since 2024 without any progress. Applicant remains unrepresented without intimation and / or justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with these matters. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these references are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
